name: example-social-media-matrix-tracker-template
title: Social Media Matrix Tracker Template
description:
社媒矩阵数据追踪面板模板（Social Media Matrix Tracker）。
Use when users ask for a cinematic, data-dense social media analytics dashboard
with multi-platform metrics, interactive charts, hover insights, range compare,
and dark/light theme switching in a single HTML artifact.

query.en: Create a social media matrix tracker dashboard template using my DESIGN.md. Keep the cinematic glassmorphism style, multi-chart analytics sections, hover tooltips, pin/drag range analysis, and light/dark switching.
query.zh-CN: 使用这个插件完成以下任务：Create a social media matrix tracker dashboard template using my DESIGN.md. Keep the cinematic glassmorphism style, multi-chart analytics sections, hover tooltips, pin/drag range analysis, and light/dark switching.
